flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cape Coral Technical College rose 16% between 2000 and 2001 ($5.4k → $6.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cape Coral Technical College rose 14% between 2000 and 2001 ($1.4k → $1.6k).
